summary: A social networking application for sharing photos and videos, enabling users to connect, share content, and communicate directly.

user_flows.name: Create Account
steps: User enters email, username, and password.
System creates a new user account.

user_flows.name: Post Content
steps: System uploads the media and creates a new post.

user_flows.name: Follow User
steps: User navigates to another user's profile.
System adds the current user to the other user's followers and the other user to the current user's following.

user_flows.name: Like/Comment on Post
steps: User clicks the 'Like' button or adds a comment.
System records the like or comment.

user_flows.name: Send Direct Message
steps: User navigates to a user's profile or direct message inbox.
System delivers the message to the recipient.

pages.name: Home Feed
pages.description: Displays posts from users the current user follows.

pages.name: User Profile
pages.description: Displays a user's profile information and their posts.

pages.name: Post Detail
pages.description: Displays a single post with its comments and likes.

pages.name: Search
pages.description: Allows users to search for other users or content.

pages.name: Direct Message Inbox
pages.description: Displays a list of direct message conversations.

pages.name: Direct Message Conversation
pages.description: Displays a conversation between two users.

pages.name: Create Post
pages.description: Page for creating a new post.

technical_requirements: Media storage and delivery (images and videos)
Database for storing user data, posts, comments, and messages
API endpoints for accessing and manipulating data
Push notifications for new followers, likes, comments, and messages
Scalable infrastructure to handle a large number of users and content
